rationale: Bug hunt C16 confirmed phantom commit pattern (3rd occurrence after C8/C9): echo_memory LLM wiring code was never pushed, only status JSONs. Fixed by actually implementing the wiring: build_narrative_context() now includes echo_memory, tension_zone, convergence_zone, total_runs. build_context_enrichment() formats cross-run death memory + veteran status + MOS convergence hints into LLM prompts. Also fixed misleading life_essence default (5→100) in narrative user prompt. Feature: 3 few-shot JSON examples in build_narrative_system_prompt() with early/mid/end-game scenarios including PROGRESS_MISSION and high rep swings per creator choice (q-20260415-005 B).
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C17 (verify echo_memory enrichment in merlin_llm_adapter.gd + llm_adapter_prompts.gd). Then feature: GFC wrap BroceliandeForest3D (q-20260415-011 — extend GFC to orchestrate BroceliandeForest3D + HubAntre). Or: keyboard/gamepad Tab navigation (q-20260415-004 — FOCUS_ALL for accessibility).
